allow: PowerShell(node -e "try { require\('./node_modules/vite/dist/node/index.js'\).build\(\).then\(\(\)=>console.log\('OK'\)\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('CAUGHT:', e.message\); console.error\(e.stack\)}\) } catch\(e\) { console.error\('OUTER:', e.message\); console.error\(e.stack\) }" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 50)
PowerShell(node -e "const v = require\('vite'\); console.log\('vite ver:', v.version || 'unknown'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(v\).slice\(0,10\)\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:ESBUILD_BINARY_PATH = \(Resolve-Path "node_modules\\@esbuild\\win32-x64\\esbuild.exe"\).Path; node -e "import\('esbuild'\).then\(v => console.log\('OK', !!v.build\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('ERR:', e.message, e.stack\)\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(node --abort-on-uncaught-exception -e "process.on\('uncaughtException', e => { console.error\('UNCAUGHT:', e\); process.exit\(11\) }\); import\('esbuild'\).then\(v => console.log\('OK'\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('ERR:', e\)\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(node -e "const e = require\('esbuild'\); console.log\('OK', typeof e.build\)" 2>&1; echo "exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

Bash(node -e "const e=require\('./src/data/events.json'\); const x=e[33]; console.log\(JSON.stringify\({id:x.id,number:x.number,cover:x.cover,photos:x.photos,venue:x.venue},null,0\)\); console.log\('has cover field on all:', e.every\(o=>'cover' in o\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const e=require\('./src/data/events.json'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(e[0]\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('all have city/cover/ticketUrl/organizer:', e.every\(o=>'city' in o && 'cover' in o && 'ticketUrl' in o && 'organizer' in o\)\)")
